content: INTENT: No structured skill applies. Emotional intensity: {intensity}/10. {intensity_guidance} Name what the user has specifically disclosed. Do not re-probe feelings they have already named. Offer presence and space, not solutions or reframes.
_selector_not_implemented: composer.py selector change is pending Rule 1 approval — this template is inert under ID-based resolution (get_intent_template uses a closed intent set that excludes new_skill_unmatched). The draft markers below are the guard against cache-enumeration paths (glob loads all templates at startup; anything that enumerates the cache rather than resolving by ID would see this file).
_binding_pending: emotions_disclosed — add '{emotions_disclosed}' binding in v0.2 once SageState schema approved; see docs/superpowers/proposals/2026-05-31-emotions-disclosed-schema.md
_review_required: Rule 1 approval (control-layer change) — note: this template follows the standing L2 user-role convention ('role': 'user'). The L2 authority-tier question (Flag A: control instructions delivered as user-role share the injection surface with user turns) is an open architectural-review item that applies to all L2 templates including this one. Rule 1 approval of this template does not settle Flag A.
